message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 80
  MessageAlign left
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFACD
  NoteBorderColor #666666
}

participant Client as Client
participant GameServer as GameServer

Client ->> GameServer : PACKET_ID_GAME_BATTING_REQ
GameServer ->> Client : PACKET_ID_GAME_BATTING_RES

note right of GameServer
방에 있는 모든 유저들
end note

GameServer ->> Client : PACKET_ID_GAME_BATTING_NTF

note over Client, GameServer
모두 배팅 했거나 or 대기 시간이 지나면 게임 결과를 보낸다
end note

GameServer ->> Client : PACKET_ID_GAME_RESULT_NTF

note right of GameServer
일정 시간이 지나면 게임 플레이 가능
end note

@enduml
